item.title: not good enough
item.description: “But if you really wanna do it right you have to consider that your rotation axis is slightly off centered and when you drive that gyroscope that slight variation will cause a wobble and…In theory you can have it work perfectly if…” Some projects require a lot of care and precision. It becomes rather futile to start something if you know your methods are not good enough. So why waste your time?

item.title: About Me
item.description: Hi I’m Shobhan, a Physics (and Mechanical Engineering) undergraduate from Georgia Tech. I enjoy all things quantum. This site is under construction and I can assure you it will be finished with a p-value of 1.
